about.title: About Ying Fu Market Inc.
about.subtitle: Who we are, what we stand for, and why customers trust us.
about.storyBody: Ying Fu Market Inc. began with a simple goal: bring dependable premium seafood and ginseng ingredients to local families and restaurants.
about.missionBody: To make traditional nourishing ingredients easier to buy with confidence, clear information, and consistent quality.
about.sourcing1: We work with trusted suppliers known for stable quality.
about.sourcing2: We review freshness, aroma, texture, and overall condition.
about.sourcing3: We keep handling and storage standards focused on product integrity.
about.trust1: Carefully selected products instead of low-grade bulk inventory.
about.trust2: Transparent product details and practical usage guidance.
about.trust3: Friendly service and long-term community relationships.

location.title: Store Location
location.subtitle: Visit us in person for product recommendations and fresh stock updates.
